  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Strengthening the passage plausibly requires sharpening the contribution claim; the current framing asserts OOD robustness gains but the stated contribution rests on an unsupported leap from method motivation to empirical outcome.",
    "R1.2": "A central logical gap exists: the conclusion that DomainShift-Reg 'substantially improves OOD robustness' is drawn from in-distribution test-set accuracy alone; closing or flagging this inference chain is likely load-bearing under a scientific-rigor reading of 'stronger'.",
    "R1.3": "All three benchmarks (CIFAR-10 test, CIFAR-100 test, ImageNet val) are in-distribution evaluations; the artifact's core robustness claim is not evidenced by any OOD split (e.g., CIFAR-10-C, ImageNet-C, DomainNet), making evidence-claim alignment a critical failure mode.",
    "R1.6": "Prose-level strengthening—tighter sentences, sharper framing, removal of hedged filler—is the most common lay reading of 'make this stronger' for a research excerpt and is central under a rhetoric-first interpretation."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should I strengthen this by improving rhetorical and prose impact while preserving the existing argument structure and evidence, or by identifying and repairing scientific gaps—specifically the absence of actual OOD benchmarks (e.g., CIFAR-10-C, ImageNet-C) needed to substantiate the robustness claims?"
}

rationale.R1.1: Strengthening the passage plausibly requires sharpening the contribution claim; the current framing asserts OOD robustness gains but the stated contribution rests on an unsupported leap from method motivation to empirical outcome.
rationale.R1.2: A central logical gap exists: the conclusion that DomainShift-Reg 'substantially improves OOD robustness' is drawn from in-distribution test-set accuracy alone; closing or flagging this inference chain is likely load-bearing under a scientific-rigor reading of 'stronger'.
rationale.R1.3: All three benchmarks (CIFAR-10 test, CIFAR-100 test, ImageNet val) are in-distribution evaluations; the artifact's core robustness claim is not evidenced by any OOD split (e.g., CIFAR-10-C, ImageNet-C, DomainNet), making evidence-claim alignment a critical failure mode.
rationale.R1.6: Prose-level strengthening—tighter sentences, sharper framing, removal of hedged filler—is the most common lay reading of 'make this stronger' for a research excerpt and is central under a rhetoric-first interpretation.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I strengthen this by improving rhetorical and prose impact while preserving the existing argument structure and evidence, or by identifying and repairing scientific gaps—specifically the absence of actual OOD benchmarks (e.g., CIFAR-10-C, ImageNet-C) needed to substantiate the robustness claims?
